lessons.title: Dividends and Distributions
lessons.description: This is a topic that appears regularly in FE-1 examinations, and getting it right requires a solid understanding of both the statutory framework and the key case law.

lessons.title: Transfer of Shares
lessons.description: A share is fundamentally freely transferable. It is a chose in action — a bundle of rights, interests, and obligations that can be bought, sold, or gifted.
